name: codex-quota-widget
description: Codex 额度查看小窗口 / Codex quota viewer mini window.

interface.shortDescription: 查看 Codex Token 使用量和额度窗口。 / View Codex token usage and quota windows.
interface.longDescription: Codex 额度查看小窗口会在 Windows 桌面上显示 Token 统计、5 小时和 7 天额度窗口、连续使用天数，并支持安全说明、本机私有素材、刷新与单实例运行。 English: A privacy-documented Windows companion that shows Codex token stats, quota windows, streak days, local-only custom assets, refresh support, and single-instance behavior.
defaultPrompt: 查看我的 Codex 额度 / Show my current Codex quota
